content:
12. 12prompt – Provides PR and repo link
• User references live GitHub PR for cognitive-archaelogy-tribunal.

13. 12response – Confirms repository creation
• Summarizes PR details, purpose, branch, status.
• Describes scope of the Tribunal (investigate, judge, sentence).
• Frames it as solve-et-coagula stage: chaos → order.
• Declares foundation laid.

⸻

VIII. Roadmap Expansion Layer

14. 12prompt (continuation) – What other repos + how to preserve context
• User asks for next repos and preservation strategy.

15. 12response – Complete Repository Roadmap
• Defines 8 total repositories with:
• Descriptions (<350 chars)
• Copilot prompts (<500 chars)
• Divides into three phases:
• Foundation: Tribunal, Constitution, Orchestrator
• Specialized Tools: Archive, AI Context, Lineage
